summary: Iteration 52: Testing P0 bug fixes - CTA button pulse animation and Admin Media placement field. Both features verified working.

minor.issue: Some older media items don't have 'placement' field (expected for legacy data)

critical_code_review_comments: CTA button pulse animation - VERIFIED WORKING: itokePulse CSS animation with scale 1 to 1.13, width varies 209-231px over time
Admin Media placement selector - VERIFIED WORKING: 4 options (Video de Abertura, Video Ofertas Gratis, Material Divulgacao, Banner / Geral)
POST /api/admin/media with placement field - VERIFIED WORKING: Saves placement correctly to DB
GET /api/media/by-placement/{placement} - VERIFIED WORKING: Returns filtered media by placement
GET /api/app-config - VERIFIED WORKING: Returns opening_video_url and free_offers_video_url from media_assets with correct placement
Media list items show placement label - VERIFIED WORKING: Shows 'Abertura', 'Ofertas Gratis', 'Divulgacao' labels

success_rate.frontend: 100% (CTA pulse animation and Admin Media placement selector verified)

test_credentials.admin_access_key: admin123 (via long press 3s on iToke logo)

seed_data_creation: Test media items created with different placements (app_opening, free_offers, marketing_material, banner_general) - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 verified: (1) CTA button 'Ofertas de graca?' on Home page has working pulse animation using CSS @keyframes itokePulse with scale 1 to 1.13, implemented via MutationObserver for reliability. (2) Admin Media upload form has 'placement' selector with 4 options: Video de Abertura (app_opening), Video Ofertas Gratis (free_offers), Material Divulgacao (marketing_material), Banner / Geral (banner_general). (3) Backend endpoints POST /api/admin/media accepts placement field, GET /api/media/by-placement/{placement} filters by placement, GET /api/app-config returns videos from media_assets with correct placement priority.

cta_pulse_animation.details: itokePulse CSS animation with scale 1 to 1.13, width varies 209-231px over 2.4s cycle
cta_pulse_animation.implementation: CSS @keyframes injected via useEffect, applied via MutationObserver for FlatList re-render reliability

admin_media_placement_selector.details: 4 pill buttons with icons: Video de Abertura, Video Ofertas Gratis, Material Divulgacao, Banner / Geral
admin_media_placement_selector.label: Onde vai aparecer?

backend_endpoints.POST /api/admin/media: Accepts placement field (app_opening, free_offers, marketing_material, banner_general) - WORKING
backend_endpoints.GET /api/media/by-placement/{placement}: Returns active media filtered by placement - WORKING
backend_endpoints.GET /api/app-config: Returns opening_video_url and free_offers_video_url from media_assets with placement priority - WORKING
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/media: Returns media list with placement field - WORKING
